lchemy.orm.sessionmaker"],"complexity_notes":"FastAPI asynchronous project-management backend using SQLAlchemy ORM, JWT authentication, Pydantic schemas, background tasks, and in-memory WebSocket broadcasts. CRUD endpoints consistently scope projects to the authenticated owner. list_projects has conditional status/search filtering, pagination, ordering, and a likely incorrect total calculation: select(count_stmt.subquery().c.id).scalar() returns the first project ID rather than a COUNT aggregate. WebSocket subscriptions do not authenticate or authorize project access. ConnectionManager is in-memory, is not suitable for multi-process deployments, and broadcasts while mutating its connection list on failures. A broad global Exception handler can mask programming errors; malformed JWT subject values may become 500 errors. JSONResponse is imported late but resolves before requests are handled. Column, create_engine, and Sequence appear unused."}
